scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py migrate
scripts.db:makemigrations: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py makemigrations
scripts.dev: npm run db && npm run db:migrate && concurrently "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:be"
scripts.dev:be: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py runserver
scripts.setup: npm i && cd backend && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput
